Hey! You found the readme.


This portfolio was built with Astro, too much coffee, and long conversations with Claude.


If you're reading this, you're the kind of person I want to work with.

project_01.exe — (RE)ROUTE

(RE)ROUTE

What if navigation optimised for how you feel, not just where you go? Reimagining walking as an experience with routing for safety, discovery, and human-ness.

119K street segments scored
386 hand-curated POIs
89% of walkers vary routes
AI · UX Research · Product Design · Data
Barcelona · Master's Thesis · Prototype · 2025
GO MODE

The Problem

"Every navigation app solves the same problem: getting you there fast. But what about making the walk worth taking?"

The Approach

GO

Destination search with routes that explain why each is different.

EXPLORE

Type a vibe. AI curates an experience — architecture trail to evening out.

WANDER

A compass and curated pins. No route. No destination. Just direction.

What Makes It Different

◆
119K street segments scored

Noise, greenery, cleanliness, cultural richness, safety — real data, not guesses.

◆
AI-powered discovery

"Artsy date" → experimental galleries, design bookshops, natural wine bars. Verified against real place data.

◆
Safety as baseline

After dark, every route shifts to well-lit, active streets. Not a mode — always on.

◆
386 hand-curated POIs

Places that don't appear on commercial platforms. Themed walks, bloom calendars, hidden courtyards.

GO MODE
GO — destination routing
EXPLORE MODE
EXPLORE — vibe-based discovery
WANDER MODE
WANDER — compass + curated pins
project_02.exe — SNAPP

SNAPP

One word. One photo. One day. A shared visual diary of a city. Built through small, daily moments.

1 word per day
1 photo per prompt
∞ perspectives
Product Design · Full-Stack · UX · Gamification
Barcelona · In use · Feb 2026
DAILY PROMPT

The Problem

"We walk past a thousand interesting things every day without seeing them."

The Approach

PROMPT

One word each day — texture, tiny, bright. Everyone in the city gets the same one.

CAPTURE

Step outside, find it, snap a photo. A cracked tile becomes the answer to pattern.

SHARE

Photos drop on a shared city map. At midnight, the map resets. No likes, no followers.

What Makes It Different

◆
Anti-social media

No algorithm, no followers, no likes. Using a phone to make you look up from it.

◆
Ephemeral by design

The map resets at midnight. Today's gallery lives for exactly one day.

◆
Deliberate constraints

One word + one day = focus. The shared map creates connection without competition.

◆
City-wide collaboration

Barcelona becomes a collaborative, ever-changing gallery that lives for one day.

DAILY PROMPT
Daily word prompt
PHOTO CAPTURE
Camera + location tagging
SHARED MAP
City-wide shared gallery
project_03.exe — PLANMYTRIP

PLANMYTRIP

A planning tool that thinks like an editor, not a spreadsheet. Live weather, image search, and inline editing — all in one flow.

15 days planned
9 cities covered
LIVE weather per destination
Frontend · APIs · Editorial Design
Personal Project · In use · Mar 2025
planmytrip.app
ITINERARY VIEW

The Problem

"Trip planning tools are either ugly spreadsheets or rigid templates. I wanted something useful that also looks like something you'd want to look at."

The Approach

EDITORIAL

Layout inspired by travel magazines. City intros, photo galleries, timelines.

LIVE DATA

Weather API per destination. Image search built in. Real-time, not static.

INLINE EDIT

Click to edit everything. A planning tool that's also beautiful enough to screenshot.

What Makes It Different

◆
Editorial design meets utility

City intro slides with split typography, day pages with photo galleries and timelines.

◆
Live weather integration

Real-time weather data per destination via Open-Meteo API.

◆
Built-in image search

Find and place photos without leaving the tool.

◆
First AI-assisted project

Designed the visual system, wrote the spec, then used Claude Code to build it.

planmytrip.app
ITINERARY VIEW
City intro + day overview
planmytrip.app
WEATHER & DETAILS
Weather widgets + timeline

EXPLORE

WANDER

SNAPP

One word. One photo. One day.

1 word/day

∞ perspectives
Product Design · Full-Stack · UX
Barcelona · In use · 2026

The Problem

PROMPT

One word per day.

CAPTURE

SHARE

What Makes It Different

◆

project_03.exe — PLANMYTRIP

PLANMYTRIP

A planning tool that thinks like an editor, not a spreadsheet.

15 days
9 cities
LIVE weather
Frontend · APIs · Editorial Design
Personal Project · In use · 2025
planmytrip.app
ITINERARY

The Problem

"Trip planning tools are ugly spreadsheets or rigid templates."

The Approach

EDITORIAL

Magazine-style layout.

LIVE DATA

Weather + images.

INLINE

Click to edit.

What Makes It Different

◆
Editorial design

City intros, photo galleries, timelines.

◆
Live weather

Open-Meteo API per destination.

AI-assisted build

planmytrip.app
ITINERARY
Day overview
planmytrip.app
